titlestmt.titleproper: Epsilon Sigma Phi, Lambda chapter records21-24-1979
titlestmt.author: Compiled by J. Parker

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Epsilon Sigma Phi, Lambda chapter records
did.physdesc: Records, correspondence, lists, speeches, minutes, financial reports, photographs.
did.abstract: Records of the Lambda Chapter of Epsilon Sigma Phi. Also, six volumes of the "Book of Annals," biographical sketches and photographs of Cornell extension and county extension staff.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding:
defitem.item: J.M. Nicholas, July 2003Daniel W. Young, February 2010

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: Epsilon Sigma Phi is the National Honorary Extension Fraternity. The Lambda chapter was established at Cornell University circa 1929.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes constitution and bylaws, initiation material, a history of the fraternity, correspondence, awards, a speech, membership lists, minutes, financial reports, and other records of the Lambda Chapter of Epsilon Sigma Phi, including information concerning Cooperative Extension, New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences, Donald J. White, Russell C. Hodnett, and others. Also, six volumes of the "Book of Annals," biographical sketches and photographs of Cornell extension and county extension staff.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Epsilon Sigma Phi, Lambda chapter records, #21-24-1979. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Agricultural extension work -- New York (State) -- Ithaca.
controlaccess.corpname: New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences

did.unittitle: Epsilon Sigma Phi, Lambda Chapter. Records, 1927-2003
New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Lambda Chapter, Active Members.
Articles of Incorporation and bylaws, Epsilon Sigma Phi.
"Epsilon Sigma Phi History" by Luke M. Schruben
Donald J. White papers and other material
Donald J. White papers and other material
Talk by E. S. Philips, annual meeting
Retirement Committee, files of C. A. Bratton
Retirement Committee, files of C. A. Bratton
Minutes of the annual meeting of the Lambda Chapter
North Eastern Region, New York, national meeting
Executive Committee and Membership Committee chairmen files
Correspondence, board meeting minutes, nominations for the Distinguished Service Ruby Certificate Award
Active membership lists, member dues and fees paid
Budget reports, correspondence, Executive Committee meeting reports
Officers' list, initiation ceremony ritual, constitution and bylaws, minutes of meetings, other reports
"Historical" list of officers, members: associate, honorary, reserve and deceased
Financial records Including checking and savings accounts
State Certificates of Recognition awarded by National Council
